name: Knockout Penguins
author: Poki
description: Knockout Penguins is an arcade brawler where strategy meets total penguin chaos! Before each round, set the direction and push power for your penguins, then watch them all charge at once—sliding, crashing, and shoving each other off the platform. Plan smart, laugh hard, and try to be the last penguin standing on the ice. Ready to knock rivals off and claim the win? How to play Knockout Penguins? Move your cursor to aim. Press E or Q to decide the power. Who created Knockout Penguins? Knockout Penguins is created by Fluffy. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Knockout Penguins for free? You can play Knockout Penguins for free on Poki. Can I play Knockout Penguins on mobile devices and desktop? Knockout Penguins can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
